subject: physics
title: 22M.1.SL.TZ2.24
question_html:
Three statements about Newton’s law of gravitation are:

I.   It can be used to predict the motion of a satellite.
II.  It explains why gravity exists.
III. It is used to derive the expression for gravitational potential energy.

Which combination of statements is correct?

A.  I and II only

B.  I and III only

C.  II and III only

D.  I, II and III
examiners_html: Comments suggested that 'gravitational potential' is more suitable for an HL question. However, candidates should have realised that statement II is incorrect so option B is the only possibility and this proved the most popular answer. The wording will be altered to 'gravitational potential energy' for publication.
